creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
* Dmitry Marakasov (amdmi3@amdmi3.ru) wrote:

Updated patch which fixes plist and adds DOCS option:

--- dia.patch begins here ---
Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile	(revision 347237)
+++ Makefile	(working copy)
@@ -26,13 +26,12 @@
 LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--disable-gnome
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
+PORT_OPTIONS=	DOCS
+
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/share/xsl/docbook/manpages/docbook.xsl:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/docbook-xsl
-MAN1=		dia.1
-MANLANG=	"" fr
 .endif
 
 #.if !defined(WITHOUT_PYTHON)
Index: pkg-plist
===================================================================
--- pkg-plist	(revision 347237)
+++ pkg-plist	(working copy)
@@ -69,6 +69,8 @@
 lib/dia/libxfig_filter.so
 lib/dia/libxslt_filter.la
 lib/dia/libxslt_filter.so
+%%PORTDOCS%%man/man1/dia.1.gz
+%%PORTDOCS%%man/fr/man1/dia.1.gz
 share/applications/dia.desktop
 share/dia/dia-splash.png
 share/dia/shapes/Assorted/arrow-chevron.png
@@ -1845,6 +1847,6 @@
 @dirrm share/dia/shapes/Assorted
 @dirrm share/dia/shapes
 @dirrm share/dia
-@dirrmtry man/fr/man1
-@dirrmtry man/fr
+%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrmtry man/fr/man1
+%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrmtry man/fr
 @dirrm lib/dia
--- dia.patch ends here ---

-- 
Dmitry Marakasov   .   55B5 0596 FF1E 8D84 5F56  9510 D35A 80DD F9D2 F77D
amdmi3@amdmi3.ru  ..:  jabber: amdmi3@jabber.ru    http://www.amdmi3.ru
